_comment: Kampa food-name vocabulary map (see docs/food-classification.md). Key = a colloquial/regional/dictation term (or a multi-word phrase) a user types; value = a list of canonical food-PHRASE queries that each resolve to ONE representative USDA food (the classifier token-matches the phrase against full food names and reads that food's nutrients). A multi-ingredient dish lists several phrases. [] = ignore this token (a non-food word). Carries VOCABULARY ONLY, never nutrition. Multi-word keys are matched greedily before single tokens. Hand-maintained; grow from the spike's missing-word list. Keys starting with _ are ignored.
